title: INNOSOL’LEG ACS - LE PROJET
subtitle: Pratiques Innovantes de gestion des Sols adaptées aux systèmes légumiers normands basées sur l’Agriculture de Conservation des Sols
description: A report presenting innovative soil conservation practices for vegetable cropping systems in Normandy. It details project activities, field trials and cover crop evaluations aimed at reducing tillage, diversifying rotations, and maximizing soil cover.
